summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and strong financial-services background. Specialized in Python, SQL, PySpark/Spark, AWS data pipelines, data warehouse/lake architecture, production reliability, monitoring, and cost-aware data processing. Built and supported large-scale telemetry and forecasting pipelines, migrated workloads toward AWS services including S3, Glue, Redshift, and ECS, and delivered executive-facing analytics with strong data quality, documentation, and operational support discipline.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Designed and operated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 infrastructure telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, transforming raw operational data into reliable analytics datasets for capacity, cost, and risk reporting.

Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform patterns using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL concepts, Redshift forecasting workloads, and ECS/EC2-hosted Python processing to support scalable cloud data operations.
Developed Spark/PySpark and Python-based processing workflows for high-volume telemetry analysis, with attention to partitioning, file formats, performance tuning, and production data reliability.

Implemented data quality, reconciliation, monitoring, and troubleshooting practices for recurring reporting cycles, reducing manual investigation and improving confidence in downstream analytics outputs.
Partnered with finance, technology, and operations stakeholders to translate capacity and usage questions into reporting datasets, executive dashboards, and actionable optimization recommendations.
Created documentation, runbooks, and repeatable operating procedures for production data workflows, incident response, validation, and support handoffs.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring data used to analyze application performance, reliability, and transaction behavior across business-critical hospitality systems.
Led the FAST analytics initiative, mining real-user and synthetic performance data to surface optimization recommendations for engineering teams and business stakeholders.
Integrated performance and operational datasets into reporting views that improved visibility into service health, system behavior, and production readiness.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Served as enterprise CA APM SME supporting 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents across a large financial-services environment.
Built Perl and Korn Shell data-extraction scripts to automate performance reporting and reduce manual weekly export work.
Designed monitoring dashboards, alert thresholds, and technical documentation used by operations and application teams to improve production observability and issue resolution.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC platform while preserving transaction performance and data correctness.
Built automated schema conversion and data validation routines to support phased migration, reconciliation, and production cutover readiness.
Optimized SQL, Oracle access patterns, and C++/OCCI transaction processing to reduce hardware footprint while maintaining sub-second query latency.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer
bullets: Developed and supported high-availability telecom billing interfaces using C/C++, Pro*C, PL/SQL, Oracle, Korn Shell, Perl, and XML across Unix/Linux environments.
Improved billing-process performance through SQL, PL/SQL, and sequence optimization, including 10x database performance gains in targeted processing flows.
Maintained production integration workflows, test cycles, documentation, and issue triage for large-scale billing and reporting systems.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Java, C++, Perl, Korn Shell, JSON, XML
skills.AWS Data Platform: Amazon S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, AWS Athena concepts, AWS Step Functions concepts, AWS Lambda concepts, AWS ECS/EC2, CloudWatch concepts, IAM/security concepts
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, data ingestion, batch processing, data warehousing, OLTP/OLAP concepts, data marts, data lakes, metadata management, data flow documentation
skills.Big Data & Processing: Apache Spark, PySpark, Hadoop/Hive, Parquet, distributed processing, partitioning, compression, high-volume telemetry processing
skills.Databases: Oracle, PL/SQL, Oracle RAC, MySQL, PostgreSQL exposure, DynamoDB concepts, relational modeling, schema design, SQL tuning
skills.Orchestration & Delivery: Airflow, workflow scheduling concepts, Git, GitHub workflows, CI/CD concepts, Docker, Agile/Scrum, technical documentation, runbooks
skills.Reliability & Observability: Monitoring, alerting, CloudWatch concepts, Dynatrace AppMon, AppDynamics, BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM, incident support, troubleshooting, root-cause analysis
skills.Governance & Quality: Data quality validation, reconciliation, access-control concepts, data lineage documentation, change management, regulated financial-services delivery
skills.Analytics & Optimization: Technology cost and usage analysis, capacity forecasting, performance/cost optimization, executive reporting, stakeholder-facing analytics

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed an AWS-oriented data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, and Bedrock concepts to support analytics-ready data, optimized file formats, and AI-assisted data access.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built Python/PySpark forecasting workflows and Streamlit reporting to turn enterprise telemetry into capacity, usage, and optimization insights for infrastructure stakeholders.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built a Python-based agentic workflow for job intake, semantic duplicate detection, scoring, JSON artifact generation, quality gates, and application tracking using LLM APIs and vector similarity.
